interface.shortDescription: Waldo is an AI-powered strategy platform for agencies and brands.
interface.longDescription: Waldo is an AI-powered strategy platform for agencies and brands. Run strategy agent, explore collected signals — paid ads, brand mentions, audience conversations, trending topics, and more — and retrieve data across your team's brand spaces.
defaultPrompt: Check the relevant mobile test coverage in Waldo
